scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:backend
scripts.publish:win: npm run build:web && dotnet publish backend/Lingofix.Backend.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:SelfContained=true -o out/win-x64
scripts.publish:osx-arm64: npm run build:web && dotnet publish backend/Lingofix.Backend.csproj -c Release -r osx-arm64 -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:SelfContained=true -o out/osx-arm64
scripts.publish:osx-x64: npm run build:web && dotnet publish backend/Lingofix.Backend.csproj -c Release -r osx-x64 -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:SelfContained=true -o out/osx-x64
scripts.publish:linux-x64: npm run build:web && dotnet publish backend/Lingofix.Backend.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:SelfContained=true -o out/linux-x64
